calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Approving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Cost Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instucting Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership, Discharding Receiver From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

OTHER GERARD KEENA , RECEIVER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Approving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Cost Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instucting Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership, Discharding Receiver From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond is GRANTED. The joint response and stipulation of the parties to be incorporated in the final order for distribution. Parties to meet and confer on the form of order and submit an order for execution at the hearing or in accordance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
